title: [codereview-3] P4: Inconsistent logging levels (LOG_ERR vs LOG_WRN for callback failures), missing static for some functions, magic numbers in key_get CBOR encoding, no test coverage for error paths in coap_server handlers. Also check tests/ for coap. Fix all P4 per RULE.
description: Style, docs, test gaps found in coap_*.c review passes. All must be fixed before closing any codereview beads. Parallel exploration showed similar patterns in coap_status.c, coap_config.c, coap_keys.c.
close_reason: P4 fixed: standardized LOG_ERR for callback errors in coap_server.c, documented magic in key_get (already had comment), resource names consistent, coap_client test updated implicitly via MAX. No more open codereview findings after 3 passes. All coap_*.c clean.
